title: M Hall
compiled_truth: M Hall is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-04-20 to 2002-05-13), M Hall sent 78 and received 524 emails, totalling 602 interactions. Top correspondents: [W  White](people/w-white) (31), [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (28), [Leslie Reeves](people/leslie-reeves) (23), [C  Gossett](people/c-gossett) (22), [Robert Superty](people/robert-superty) (13).
